evals.prompt: 从需求分析中提炼测试点清单。
evals.expected_output: 读取 requirements-analysis.md，提炼结构化测试点到 specs/testpoints.md，包含命名字典、TP_ID、优先级、回归层级。
assertions: Reads requirements-analysis.md from the current change directory
Generates specs/testpoints.md with naming dictionary (module and feature tables)
Each test point has TP_ID following the TP_MODULE_FEATURE_SEQ format
Test points are organized by module and categorized (Functional/Boundary/Exception/Integration/Non-Functional)
Seeds context metadata with coverage_estimate and testlib_reuse

evals.prompt: 这个功能要测哪些点？没有做过 analysis，直接从 proposal 提炼。
evals.expected_output: 检测到无 requirements-analysis.md，降级从 proposal.md 直接提炼测试点，标注信息不足的风险。
assertions: Detects absence of requirements-analysis.md and falls back to proposal.md
Still produces valid testpoints.md with TP_IDs and priorities
Notes that analysis was skipped and coverage may be incomplete
Suggests running testspec-analysis for deeper coverage
Does not fabricate analysis content that wasn't in the proposal

evals.prompt: 帮我列测试清单，重点是支付模块的边界和异常场景。
evals.expected_output: 支付模块的 Boundary 和 Exception 类别测试点更丰富，其他模块保持最小覆盖。
assertions: Payment module has more Boundary and Exception test points than other modules
Test points cover specific boundary scenarios (amount limits, currency precision, etc.)
Exception test points cover payment-specific failures (timeout, insufficient funds, etc.)
Other modules still have minimum coverage (at least Functional category)
Priority distribution reflects the user's focus area
